completed_slice.description: Integrated the committed Cloudflare deployment metadata verifier into the production Pages workflow.

remaining_blocker: Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, then dispatch .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml.
next_action: Run the credentialed workflow and require the metadata artifact to match exact project, full commit SHA, Wrangler deployment URL, and successful deploy stage before accepting deployment evidence.
